name: Ninja Shawarma Chicken Fillet Strips
purpose: Universal batch chicken base for wraps, bowls, crunchwraps, and emergency omelets.

ingredients.item: chicken fillet, cut into 1.5-2 cm strips

instructions: Cut chicken fillet into strips 1.5-2 cm thick.
Mix yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, coriander, turmeric, cinnamon, salt, and black pepper.
Marinate at least 30 minutes. Longer is acceptable if refrigerated.
Place chicken in one layer; cook in batches if needed.
Check doneness; add 2-3 minutes if needed. Avoid overcooking because fillet dries quickly.
reheating: Microwave 60-120 seconds if used in bowls.
substitutions: Do not use chicken thighs in this version; user requested fillet consistency.
Turkey fillet can substitute only if chicken is unavailable.
meal_prep_notes: This is the only chicken preparation for the week.
Use in wraps, bowls, crunchwraps, and fallback omelets.
why_it_fits_weekly_plan: High-protein low-friction batch base for multiple meals.
